PC          Instruction         Machine Code
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
0x0000		addi s0,s0,1        00000000000101000000010000010011
0x0004		sub t3,zero,s0      01000000100000000000111000110011
0x0008		add s1,s0,s0        00000000100001000000010010110011
0x000c		slt t0,s0,s1        00000000100101000010001010110011
0x0010		slt t1,s1,s0        00000000100001001010001100110011
0x0014		srl a2,t2,s0        00000000100000111101011000110011
0x0018		srl a3,t2,t2        00000000011100111101011010110011
0x001c		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
